inputs.titre: Création du Marylebone Cricket Club (MCC), qui codifie les règles du cricket

reason: The image depicts a gathering of men in clothing consistent with the late 18th century. They are wearing cravats, breeches, wigs (or powdered hair), and dark coats typical of the era.
